utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24), transportation (flight details and cost in EUR), accommodation (hotel name and cost in EUR), activities (specified list and cost in EUR), additional_services (includes extra service—dietary note), and total_budget (full cost breakdown with currency). Therefore, all items are present and fully detailed according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following items: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'; transportation 'Round-trip flights with Budget Airlines, economy class'; accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel'; and activities 'City Walking Tour', 'Golf Day', and 'Fine Dining Experience'. Using the ground-truth ratings: Prague, Czech Republic has a rating of 6; Budget Airlines Economy Class has a rating of 3; Family Haven Hotel has a rating of 8; City Walking Tour has a rating of 8; Golf Day has a rating of 10; and Fine Dining Experience has a rating of 10. These correspond directly to the items chosen in the AI’s package.
